The Global Sanctum

A global collection of wellness and retreat spaces.

The Global Sanctum gathers them in one place, organised by intent and practice. The concierge is its personal side: where the collection lets you search for yourself, we do the looking for you.

Retreat Venues

From yoga shalas and meditation halls to creative studios, silent and spiritual retreats and immersive escapes in nature — many built around purpose-made spaces for practice. These are only a few of the styles we gather; the collection reaches a great deal further.

Wellness Venues & Experiences

From thermal springs and bathhouses to day spas, wellness resorts and quiet eco-sanctuaries, with practices spanning Ayurveda, breathwork, sound and bodywork. A glimpse of what awaits — the collection holds far more besides.

Wellness Guests

The place, and the experience within.

Tell us what you are seeking. We curate a short, personal selection of wellness venues and experiences, and make the introductions.

Tell us what you are seeking →
Retreat Hosts

The venue for the retreat you are creating.

Tell us the kind of retreat, the place and the dates, and we find and introduce you to the venues that fit.

Tell us about your retreat →
Venue Owners

Visibility, and the right introductions.

A referral partnership, not a listing. We come to know your venue, promote it to the hosts and guests we serve, and bring the right people to you.

Become a referral partner →
How it works
I

Share your vision

Tell us what you are seeking, in as much detail as you like.

II

We curate your matches

We prepare a short, personal selection from the collection.

III

We make the introduction

We connect you directly, then step quietly back.

The Platform · Coming Soon

The collection, opening to all.

The Global Sanctum brings together more than 5,600 curated wellness and retreat venues and experiences, organised by practice and purpose rather than by price. The platform opens to all soon. Reach the collection now through Sanctum Concierge, and receive a personal selection, shaped around what you are seeking.

What it is

A global, intent-led collection of wellness and retreat venues, organised by practice and purpose rather than by price — searchable, comparable, and honestly described.

Who it is for

Anyone seeking a wellness space or planning a retreat, and the venues who wish to be found by them — guests, hosts and owners alike.

Why it exists

The spaces that matter are scattered across countless sites and languages. We gather them into one considered place, so the right one can actually be found.

The benefit

Search by intent and modality, see venues described by what they truly offer, and reach them directly — with the concierge alongside whenever you would rather we looked for you.

Be the first to know →

A monthly newsletter on rest, place and practice.

The Sanctum Journal is our newsletter, sent once a month. Expect quiet essays, venue and destination portraits, interviews with the people behind them, and field notes from the world of wellness and retreat. A publication by The Global Sanctum.

Thank you. You are on the list.

Sent monthly. Unsubscribe anytime.
